overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character riding a horse through diverse wilderness terrain including grassy meadows, riverside paths, and rocky foothills under overcast skies. The journey progresses from forested trails to open grassland and finally into rocky canyon terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy wilderness trail along forested ridge

events.description: river valley becomes visible through the trees on the left side

agents.ego_description: trotting steadily along the dirt trail through grassy meadows with pine forest on the right

entered.detail: dense evergreen forest lining the right side of the trail
rolling green hills descending into a valley on the left
worn dirt path cutting through the grass
hazy mountains visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view following a horse rider along a dirt trail through expansive grassland. Tall pine forests line the right side while a grassy valley descends to the left. Around the 8-second mark, a river valley becomes visible through the trees, hinting at the varied terrain ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside trail with water on the right

events.description: passing a wooden trail signpost beside the path
turning left away from the river onto open grassland

agents.ego_description: riding along the riverbank before turning left onto an open meadow path

entered.detail: calm body of water visible through the trees on the right
weathered wooden sign beside the trail indicating directions
lush grass lining the edge of the water

segments.scene_description: The rider follows the trail alongside a river or lake visible on the right, passing a wooden signpost around 24 seconds. The pine forest recedes into the distance as the camera turns left away from the water around 32 seconds, heading toward open grassland.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland meadow approaching rocky foothills

events.description: large rocky cliff formation becomes prominent on the left horizon

agents.ego_description: cantering across open grassland toward distant rock formations

entered.detail: large gray rock outcropping rising from the grassland
expansive field of tall green grass with scattered wildflowers

segments.scene_description: Crossing the open grassland meadow, the terrain becomes more rugged as large rocky cliff faces come into view on the left around 42 seconds. The pine forest on the right grows closer again as the rider maintains a steady canter across the wild terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon trail with steep cliff walls

events.description: entering rocky terrain with large boulders and cliff faces

agents.ego_description: navigating through rocky terrain with cliffs on the left and forest on the right

entered.detail: large rocks and stone debris scattered along the path
distant rocky peaks and cliff structures

segments.scene_description: The final segment transitions into a more enclosed rocky canyon environment. The camera rides alongside a steep cliff face that dominates the left side of the frame, while scattered boulders appear in the foreground. The terrain becomes rougher with gravel and rocks replacing the smooth grass as the journey continues toward the distant rock formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an expansive wilderness that transforms from open grasslands and forests into a rugged rocky canyon. It begins by following a horse rider along a dirt trail flanked by tall pine forests and a descending grassy valley, which gradually reveals a river valley through the trees. As the rider passes a wooden signpost along the water's edge, the forest recedes and the camera turns away from the river to cross a wide, open meadow. The terrain then becomes increasingly rugged as large rocky cliff faces emerge on the left, while the pine forest closes back in on the right. Finally, the scene shifts into an enclosed canyon environment where the smooth grass is replaced by gravel and boulders beneath a steep, dominating cliff face.
